title: Urban Transportation
description: For questions 1–8, read the text below and choose which answer (A, B, C or D) best completes each gap.

content.text: Urban transportation systems have (0) enormous changes over the past century, transforming the way people move around cities. The introduction of underground railways in the late nineteenth century (1) a revolution in public transport, allowing millions of commuters to travel quickly beneath congested streets. Buses and trams followed, creating networks that (2) entire metropolitan areas. However, the rise of private car ownership in the mid-twentieth century led to serious problems, including traffic congestion, air pollution, and urban sprawl. Today, city planners are (3) to find sustainable solutions to these challenges. Many cities are investing heavily in cycling infrastructure, creating dedicated lanes that make it safer for people to (4) to work by bicycle. Electric vehicles are becoming increasingly common, helping to reduce harmful emissions. Ride-sharing apps have changed the way people (5) of transportation, offering flexible alternatives to car ownership. Looking to the future, autonomous vehicles and flying taxis may (6) transform urban mobility. However, the most effective solutions often involve encouraging people to use public transport rather than private cars. Cities with efficient, affordable metro systems have significantly lower levels of congestion and pollution. The (7) lies in integrating different modes of transport into seamless networks that make sustainable travel the most (8) choice for citizens.

example.explanation: 'Undergone changes' es la colocación correcta para describir que algo ha experimentado transformaciones.

questions.explanation: 'Sparked a revolution' es una colocación expresiva que significa iniciar un cambio importante.
'Covered areas' es la colocación correcta para describir que algo abarca o cubre una zona.
'Striving to find' expresa un esfuerzo determinado por alcanzar un objetivo difícil.
'Commute to work' es la expresión específica para describir el viaje diario al trabajo.
'Think of' es el phrasal verb correcto para expresar cómo percibimos o consideramos algo.
'Further transform' indica una transformación adicional a las ya mencionadas.
'The key lies in' es una expresión fija que indica dónde está la solución principal.
'Convenient choice' es la colocación correcta para describir una opción práctica y fácil.
